title: Sukreeswarar temple
tagline: Sukreeswarar temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sukreesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Sarkkar Periyapalayam in Tiruppur district in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Sukreesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Sarkkar Periyapalayam in Tiruppur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: South Nallur
topPlaces.description: South Nallur is a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nallur, Tirupur
topPlaces.description: Nallur was a third grade municipality in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, the town had a population of 70,115.

topPlaces.name: Thottipalayam
topPlaces.description: Thottipalayam is a census town and neighbourhood in Tiruppur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is part of the Tiruppur North taluk in Tiruppur district.

topPlaces.name: Neripperichal
topPlaces.description: Neripperichal is a census town in Tirupur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Tiruppur
topPlaces.description: Tiruppur or Tirupur ([t̪ɪɾɨppuːr] ), is a city and municipal corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located on the banks of the Noyyal River in Western Tamil Nadu, it is the fourth largest city in the state.

topPlaces.name: Puliakulam
topPlaces.description: Puliakulam is a residential neighborhood in the city of Coimbatore. The Idol in Puliakulam Vinayagar Temple is one of the largest monolithic(Single stoned) statues and the largest Ganesha idol in Asia .

topPlaces.name: Chengapalli
topPlaces.description: Chengapalli is a biggest landmark located in between Salem to Coimbatore Highway (NH 544) Tirupur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has the status of a panchayat town in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Muruganpalayam
topPlaces.description: Muruganpalayam is a census town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: South Nallur is a panchayat town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Nallur was a third grade municipality in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, the town had a population of 70,115.
Thottipalayam is a census town and neighbourhood in Tiruppur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located in the western part of the state, it is part of the Tiruppur North taluk in Tiruppur district.
Neripperichal is a census town in Tirupur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Tiruppur or Tirupur ([t̪ɪɾɨppuːr] ), is a city and municipal corporation in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Located on the banks of the Noyyal River in Western Tamil Nadu, it is the fourth largest city in the state.

Puliakulam is a residential neighborhood in the city of Coimbatore. The Idol in Puliakulam Vinayagar Temple is one of the largest monolithic(Single stoned) statues and the largest Ganesha idol in Asia .
Chengapalli is a biggest landmark located in between Salem to Coimbatore Highway (NH 544) Tirupur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has the status of a panchayat town in Tamil Nadu.
Muruganpalayam is a census town in Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sukreeswarar temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sukreeswarar temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sukreeswarar temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sukreeswarar temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sukreeswarar temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sukreeswarar temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sukreeswarar temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sukreeswarar temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are South Nallur, Nallur, Tirupur, Thottipalayam, Neripperichal, Tiruppur.
